# DIY chatbot

<!-- source: 04-llm-from-api.qmd sections "DIY stats bot" and "Improving the stats bot";
     reuses resources/DIY-stats-bot-system.md as-is -->

Building the Bilby stats bot from a system prompt, finding the easter egg, and the security lesson it teaches.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge editing the stats bot's system prompt and observing the behaviour change.
:::
